privileged_info_summary: Task creates a multi-currency investment portfolio in Portfolio Performance with EUR base currency. Two cash accounts: EUR Cash Account (EUR) and USD Cash Account (USD). Two securities accounts: EUR Securities and USD Securities. Securities: Allianz SE (ISIN DE0008404005, ticker ALV, EUR) and Apple Inc (ISIN US0378331005, ticker AAPL, USD). Deposits on 2024-01-02: 10,000 EUR and 10,000 USD. Buy transactions on 2024-01-15: 20 shares Allianz at 242.50 EUR/share with 9.90 EUR fees; 25 shares Apple at 185.00 USD/share with 4.95 USD fees. Portfolio file saved to /home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/multicurrency_portfolio.xml.
